title: Why Women Sin
writer: Christian Coffinet, Guy Lefranc, Jacques Séverac
actors: Dany Carrel, Pierre Vaneck, Yves Deniaud
plot: After escaping from her reform school , young and comely Betty is reunited with her lover Frederic, a journalist. In search of pleasures and of the money that buys them, the young pair follow the wrong path, to disastrous conseque...
